entry.title: Carshare pilot suggests e-bikes don't dent car ownership
entry.summary: A 40-household carshare pilot found that families who bought e-bikes kept both of their cars anyway, raising questions about substitution claims.
entry.activist:hint: challenges=ebike-vs-car; claim=a small 40-household pilot found e-bike buyers kept both cars anyway

entry.title: Restaurant chains switch to induction, line cooks won over
entry.summary: Three national kitchen chains completed induction cooktop conversions this spring, and their line cooks report faster service and cooler kitchens.
entry.activist:hint: supports=induction-stove; claim=three national restaurant chains switched to induction and their line cooks say they'd never go back

entry.title: City council debates new bus rapid transit line
entry.summary: The council heard four hours of testimony on a proposed bus rapid transit corridor; a vote is expected next month.
